response_text: Our vacation policy allows 15 days PTO annually, accruing 1.25 days per month. Carry-over is allowed up to 5 days into the next year. Please submit requests 2 weeks in advance.
Payroll is processed every other Friday. Direct deposit takes 1-2 business days to appear in your account. If you have questions about your pay stub, contact HR.
We're always looking for talented people. Check our careers page at sauc-e.com/careers for open positions. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis.
Cool. Your question has been noted. We'll get back to you when we get back to you. That's how this works.
All company policies are documented in the employee handbook. Please review them carefully. Ignorance is not an excuse.
